productDisplayName: Spinn Men Gen X White Shoes
description: Style NoteCreated for today's generation, this spinn Gen X shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetic. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love!Product DetailsRound toed casual shoe in white and beige with a slightly upraised heel and lace-up fasteningSynthetic and leather upper with nubuck overlaysWell padded collar and tongue (with branding)Foldable pull tab with branding Foam EVA midsole with heel tubes to give flexibility and shock supportTPU outsole with patterned groovesHeel reinforced onto the upper at the toe box to act as a toe guardMaterial and CareSynthetic and leatherDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
